aboutTeaser.title: A small room. A long obsession.
aboutTeaser.subtitle: Fourteen years, twelve seats, one shared evening at a time — a quiet atelier built around the seasons.

menuPreview.title: A glimpse of tonight's pass.
menuPreview.subtitle: Four dishes from the current tasting — the full menu is presented when you arrive.

galleryPreview.title: Soft brass, low light, and quiet pauses.
galleryPreview.subtitle: A look at the dining room, the kitchen, and the moments in between.

closingCta.title: Two seatings. Twelve seats. One unforgettable night.
closingCta.subtitle: Weekend tables open four weeks in advance and rarely last the day. We hold a small list of weekday seats for last-minute guests.
